## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create signup page with form validation and password strength meter
- Use mock account creation flow only
- Include terms checkbox and success confirmation state
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Password strength meter with 4 levels and text labels
  - Validation summary banner appears above form on submit failure
  - Inline field validation messages with ARIA associations

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Signup page built with mock flow
- [ ] Validation and success states present
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for all key states
